children.label: A
children.text: any other provision of this chapter; or

children.label: B
children.text: the application of this chapter to any other person or circumstance; and

children.label: A
children.text: the provision of this chapter with respect to which the judgment is rendered; or

children.label: B
children.text: the application of the provision of this chapter to each person or circumstance directly involved in the controversy in which the judgment is rendered.
